title: Thesis on Drugs
html: Stub. Yahir's recurring late-2021 framing of drugs as a compounding minor distraction, not a single-shot disaster — "a banana in Mario Kart" (2021 12 05 hey cameron this is yg how are you doing dude i dont know if). The November companion piece is "You don't know what you have become until you have become it" (2021 11 05 do you think that ceos of the future will be at a disadvanta). First explicitly named as a to-write project in the December note.

related.label: CEOs of the future without engineering — and the drug-creep self-warning
Hey Cameron — crypto follow-up + 'banana in Mario Kart' drugs thesis
